summary: MANUTRIX Bug Fix Testing - Both reported bugs verified as FIXED. Bug 1: Inspeção checklist Conforme/Não Conforme buttons now appear correctly (tipo field fallback working). Bug 2: QR Code on ativo detail page is now a real scannable QRCodeSVG (not just an icon). Scanner page TAG search also working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 404 when searching by TAG (expected behavior - falls back to /api/ativos/tag/{value})

passed_tests: Bug Fix 1: Inspeção checklist - Conforme/Não Conforme buttons visible for all checklist items
Bug Fix 1: Clicking Conforme button highlights it and updates counter (1/4 respondidos)
Bug Fix 1: Checklist items have tipo field (fallback to 'boolean' working)
Bug Fix 1: CONCLUIR INSPEÇÃO button visible at bottom
Bug Fix 2: QR Code on ativo detail page is real QRCodeSVG (not just icon)
Bug Fix 2: QR Code shows TAG below it (e.g., BOM-001)
Bug Fix 2: 'Escaneie para acessar este ativo' text visible
Bug Fix 2: QR Code label visible
Scanner Page: Camera button (ABRIR CÂMERA) with data-testid working
Scanner Page: Manual TAG search input with data-testid working
Scanner Page: Search button with data-testid working
Scanner Page: TAG search (BOM-001) navigates to correct ativo detail page
Regression: Dashboard KPIs (Disponibilidade, Conformidade, MTTR, MTBF) visible
Regression: Dashboard quick actions (ESCANEAR, RONDA, NOVA OS, INSPEÇÃO) visible
Regression: Ordens de Serviço page loads with NOVA OS button
Regression: Estoque page loads with NOVO ITEM button and item list

bug_fixes_verified.bug: Inspeção checklist não mostrava botões Conforme/Não Conforme
bug_fixes_verified.root_cause: tipo field missing from checklist items
bug_fixes_verified.fix_applied: Frontend fallback (itemTipo = item.tipo || 'boolean') + Backend migration on startup

bug_fixes_verified.bug: QR Code nos ativos era apenas ícone estático
bug_fixes_verified.root_cause: Was using Lucide QrCode icon instead of real QR code
bug_fixes_verified.fix_applied: Installed qrcode.react and using QRCodeSVG component

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all bug fixes verified, regression tests passed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Both user-reported bugs are now fixed and verified. Bug 1 (checklist buttons) was fixed with frontend fallback + backend migration. Bug 2 (QR Code) was fixed by using qrcode.react library. Scanner page TAG search works correctly. All P0 CRUD functionality from iteration_3 still working.
